results.title: D.R. Horton AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
D.R. Horton, America's largest homebuilder, has embraced AI technology to streamline operations and address the housing shortage. The company's most significant AI initiative is a multi-year partnership with Prophetic, an AI-native platform for land acquisition and development analysis, deployed across all D.R. Horton operations in 30+ states[1]. This deployment represents one of the most significant applications of AI in U.S. homebuilding to date, aimed at accelerating the identification and entitlement of suitable development land[2]. The company also utilizes AI across various business functions including design & planning, project management, and customer service, reflecting the broader industry trend where 32% of builders now use AI compared to just 20% in 2024[3]. With the U.S. facing a shortage of approximately 4.7 million homes, D.R. Horton's AI initiatives position the company to evaluate development opportunities faster and help address the affordable housing crisis[4].
...

## AI Initiatives
...
### Prophetic AI Land Acquisition Platform
...
Organization-wide deployment of AI-native platform for land acquisition and development analysis across 30+ states
...
Platform includes ZoneAI™ for zoning analysis, SiteAI™ for automated site planning, SearchAI™ for parcel discovery, DevMap™ for market intelligence, and DealDesk™ for CRM functionality. Reduces land analysis time from 2-3 hours to 30 seconds per parcel.
...
How is D.R. Horton using AI in their operations?
...
D.R. Horton primarily uses AI through their partnership with Prophetic for land acquisition analysis, reducing evaluation time from hours to minutes and enabling analysis of thousands more parcels per month.
...
What AI tools does D.R. Horton use for land development?
...
The company uses Prophetic's AI platform which includes ZoneAI for zoning analysis, SiteAI for automated site planning, SearchAI for parcel discovery, DevMap for market intelligence, and DealDesk for CRM.
...
How does D.R. Horton's AI help with the housing shortage?
...
By accelerating land identification and analysis from weeks to minutes, the AI platform helps D.R. Horton bring affordable housing supply online faster to address the estimated 4.7 million home shortage in the U.S.
...
When did D.R. Horton start using AI technology?
...
D.R. Horton announced their major AI partnership with Prophetic in November 2025, though the company has been using AI in various business functions as part of the broader industry trend of increasing AI adoption.
...
D.R
...
AI enables D.R. Horton to evaluate land opportunities dramatically faster than competitors, potentially allowing them to secure the best development sites before others complete their manual analysis processes.

...
### Using Machine Learning Techniques to Classify Foods in an Allergy Friendly Diet Database
...
As the number of food allergy sufferers around the world increases, so does the need for accurate allergy classification models. The goal of this study was to use natural language processing and machine learning algorithms to determine which foods in the US FoodData Central database contain allergens and should be avoided by food allergy sufferers. Exploratory data analysis and data cleaning were performed to provide insight into the dataset, eliminate null values, remove unwanted numbers and symbols, tokenize the dataset, correct misspelled words, eliminate any non-food words using the USAS tagger, and stem the words to help reduce the overall size of the dataset. Word2Vec, Doc2Vec, Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency vectorizers were applied to the dataset and compared to find the best model. In some cases, Principal Component Analysis was also applied to the dataset to further reduce the size of the document vectors. Both unsupervised learning and supervised learning methods were used in this project. K-Means, Latent Dirichlet Allocation and Latent Semantic Indexing unsupervised learning techniques were applied to the dataset and their results evaluated. Next, Multilabel Naïve Bayes, K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Decision Tree Classifiers, and Random Forest Classifiers supervised learning methods were applied to the dataset and their performance evaluated. Clustering methods had little success in accurately identifying allergen food groupings on this dataset and were deemed insufficient for the scope of this project. Decision Tree and Random Forest classifier models were able to achieve accuracy of over 0.99 and cross-validation scores of over 97%, with Naïve Bayes and K-Nearest Neighbors producing lower accuracies ranging from 0.95-0.96. Future research should include re-evaluation of clustering models for allergen classification and explore the possibilities of converting these findings into a publicly accessible database. Show less

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/jordanchavez_actively-intelligence-led-revenue-activity-7390015478934712321-l0wv
...
Activity: Regen Hatcher reacted on this
...
Leadership hits different the second time around.
...
Big news: I’m stepping into leading the Enterprise Team at Actively AI .
...
I can’t express how excited (and truly grateful) I am to step back into leadership. The trust and support from this team over the past seven months has been unreal.
...
When I stepped back from leadership into an IC role, it wasn’t easy but it was necessary. I wanted to prove I could execute lights out in the enterprise: long, complex, sometimes gnarly deal cycles where strategy, patience, and precision matter more than anything else.
...
Early-stage selling humbles you fast. There’s no playbook just constant change, chaos, and compounding learnings. It's also what makes this all so rewarding. It forces you to grow faster than the company itself.
...
I always knew I'd want to move back into people leadership. I’ve found the most fulfillment in helping others succeed, not surprisingly because I grew up watching my grandfather, a lifelong teacher and coach, live that every day.
...
But going back to being an IC was a shock to the system. No safety net, no one to manage but yourself. You have to be a driver, setting the pace, making calls with incomplete information, and moving forward anyway. It rebuilt my confidence but more than that reminded me that leadership isn’t a title, it’s how you show up every day, whether you’re closing deals or building others up.
...
Now, I get to do both - lead by example and build others up. Grateful for the opportunity to keep learning, growing, and pushing what’s possible in enterprise AI with this team. 

Huge thank you to Tyler John Mihir Garimella Anshul Gupta Ajay Agarwal for your trust and confidence in me. 
Thank you to Jordan Karr for showing me the ropes early on, Elliot Osgood for keeping me sane and holding space to be vulnerable on this journey together.
...
To Jake Jessup Megan Padilla - cannot wait to lean in with y'all to crush Q4 and beyond!
...
To everyone else I didn't mention on the team here at Actively - thank you all and let's fuckin' go!!!!
...
BTW I'm hiring :) https://lnkd.in/e8bJaA-w

results.title: Lead Data Scientist Job in Boston | Lennar Homes
highlights:
# Lead Data Scientist
...
- We require a bachelors or masters degree in Statistics, Economics, Math, Computer Science, Data Science, Machine Learning, or a related discipline, or equivalent practical experience. - We need 5+ years of relevant experience as a data scientist, machine learning engineer, or applied AI developer delivering production-ready models and systems; candidates with a PhD need 1+ year, and those with an MS need 3+ years. - We expect strong proficiency in Python and SQL, plus experience owning the full data science stack from data pipelines through model deployment. - We look for hands-on experience with AI development frameworks such as LangChain, Strands, Amazon Bedrock, AgentCore, or similar tools. - We require experience with experimentation methods including A/B testing, uplift modeling, multi-armed bandits, and causal machine learning. - We value exposure to machine vision techniques such as CNNs, transfer learning, and embeddings, as well as NLP methods including embeddings, transformers, and prompt engineering. - We expect familiarity with AI agent observability and evaluation tools such as LangFuse, RAGAS, Weights & Biases, or custom monitoring solutions. - We need experience integrating systems through APIs, A2A protocol, MCP servers, and orchestration pipelines. - We look for comfort working with large-scale, imperfect real-world data and making progress in complex environments. - We require strong engineering capability to design and maintain production pipelines, microservices, and scalable systems. - We value a proven ability to navigate ambiguity, prototype quickly, and move solutions into production. - We need a collaborative communicator who can align technical solutions with business priorities across varied stakeholders. - Bonus: we consider experience with RAG pipelines, LLM fine-tuning, RLHF, multi-agent orchestration, feature stores, survival analysis or churn modeling, and attribution modeling an advantage. - This is primarily a sedentary office role that requires the ability to operate computer equipment and perform physical movements such as speaking, hearing, bending, stooping, reaching, lifting, and carrying up to 25 lbs, with finger dexterity required.
...
- We design, build, and deploy autonomous AI agents using frameworks like Amazon Bedrock and AgentCore to solve business challenges in pricing, sales, operations, and customer interactions. - We apply machine vision and feature extraction to home attributes such as photos, plans, and finishes to support premium pricing and personalization strategies. - We engineer and maintain data pipelines and supporting systems for all models and agents, ensuring scalability and reliability. - We integrate agents with enterprise systems and protocols, including MCP servers, A2A protocol, and internal APIs. - We design and run experiments such as A/B tests, multi-armed bandits, and uplift models to measure and improve model and agent performance. - We ensure observability and reliability for deployed agents through logging, evaluation, monitoring, and drift detection. - We proactively gather stakeholder feedback and adapt our solutions to drive adoption and measurable business impact. - We translate complex data science and statistical findings into clear recommendations, narratives, and visualizations for executives and non-technical audiences. - We favor incremental, explainable solutions that deliver quick wins and can scale over time. - We experiment with new tools and approaches while maintaining robustness, governance, and production scalability. - We share learnings with the wider team to elevate our data science and agentic development practices across the organization. - We manage timelines and expectations transparently with both the data science team and business stakeholders.

results.title: Data Scientist Job in Miami | Lennar Homes
highlights:
# Data Scientist
...
- We require a bachelors degree in data science, mathematics, statistics, engineering, computer science, or a related discipline, or equivalent hands-on experience. - We expect 3+ years of experience using data science to solve business challenges and deliver actionable insights. - We require 2+ years of SQL development experience. - We value exposure to AI or machine learning solutions in academic or business settings. - We look for an interest in helping us evolve into a more insights-driven organization. - We need the ability to shape data science methods around practical business problems. - We value experience supporting analytics or modeling efforts that improve business performance. - We require proficiency in preparing data for analytics, reporting, and machine learning applications. - We look for experience developing and validating data science models or analytical solutions in applied, academic, or business environments. - We expect working knowledge of machine learning principles, statistics, and model evaluation techniques. - We value experience contributing to data applications, dashboards, or analytics products. - We appreciate familiarity with AI, automation, or emerging analytics technologies. - We value familiarity with Agile practices such as Scrum or Kanban. - We prefer experience with machine learning libraries such as scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Keras, or similar tools. - We expect understanding of core software engineering practices, including version control, testing, and code structure. - We value familiarity with cloud platforms, databases, and data infrastructure concepts. - Experience with NoSQL or big data technologies is a plus. - Experience with knowledge graphs or graph-based analytics is a plus. - This role is primarily sedentary and requires the ability to operate computer equipment with finger dexterity. - We may require up to 10% travel to divisions within our organization. - We look for strong interpersonal skills, a solid work ethic, teamwork, openness to constructive feedback, and willingness to cross-train as needed.
...
- We build, test, and refine predictive and analytical models for internal stakeholders using structured and unstructured data. - We iterate on AI development, including agents and pipelines. - We support measurement, monitoring, and analysis to drive continuous improvement. - We prepare, cleanse, and combine data from multiple sources using strong analytical and engineering practices. - We collaborate with cross-functional teams to access data and deepen data understanding. - We partner with engineering teams to help deploy models into business applications. - We take part in experimentation and iterative development to improve models and business outcomes. - We communicate technical results and data science concepts to analysts and non-technical stakeholders. - We contribute to knowledge sharing and support our teammates as needed.
...
We are Lennar, one of the nations leading homebuilders and a Fortune 500 company recognized among the top homebuilders in the United States. Our mission is to create an extraordinary experience for our homeowners, communities, and associates by building quality homes, delivering exceptional customer
...
, giving back to the communities where we live and work, and fostering opportunity and growth throughout our
...
Data Scientist II role sits within our Digital Experience organization, where we use data and analytics to improve business outcomes across Lennar. We offer a supportive workplace with comprehensive benefits, including medical, dental, and vision coverage; a 401(k) plan with company match; paid parental leave; associate assistance support; education assistance; adoption assistance; vacation, holiday, sick, and personal time; referral bonuses; home purchase discounts; and special company events. We are
...
to an inclusive, growth-oriented environment and we are an equal opportunity employer.

# Senior Generative AI Engineer (Engineer Machine Learning 4) - 26195
...
HII-Mission Technologies is seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to join the team. This will be a remote position, with occasional travel to the team's office in Annapolis Junction, MD. This role will support the team in creating and managing end-to-end generative AI solutions. The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.
...
- Operational AI Implementation: Research, develop, and apply machine learning, deep learning, and large language model (LLM) techniques for deployment in operational environments.
...
- Full Stack Design and Development: Rapidly design and create prototype applications to demonstrate AI capabilities. Transition prototypes to production by designing and implementing well-architected, scalable software stacks.
...
- Client Engagement: Support meetings with internal clients and external customers as a subject matter expert in AI and advanced software solutions, with a focus on cloud technologies and generative AI.
...
- 9 years relevant experience with Bachelors in related field; 7 years relevant experience with Masters in related field; 4 years relevant experience with PhD or Juris Doctorate in realted field; or High School Diploma or equivalent and 13 years relevant experience.
...
- Programming languages: Python
...
- Containerized development and deployment: Docker, Rancher, and/or K8s.
- Cloud engineering: Azure, AWS, or GCP.
- Databases: SQL, NoSQL, and/or vector databases.
- CI/
...
- Hands-on experience with current open-source LLMs and ecosystem tools (e.g., model serving, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, embeddings).
- Experience developing generative AI products or platforms, including multimodal use cases (e.g., text, vision, audio, document understanding).
...
- Bachelors in Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics, or equivalent technologies/experience.
- Experience with:
...
- UI/UX development: JavaScript (Angular, React).
- Backend development: REST API, web apps, microservices.
- Experience supporting feature development and maintenance for an enterprise-scale application.
- Experience building multi-step agentic workflows and orchestrators using frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, PromptGraph, or custom in-house pipelines.

- We are looking for a motivated Data Scientist ready to take us to the next level! If you have designing, developing, and deploying state-of-the-art agentic systems, automation solutions, and generative AI applications to enable autonomous decision-making and optimize business processes and are looking for your next career move, apply now
...
Job Description
- We are looking for a Data Scientist - Agentic Developer to design cutting-edge AI solutions and autonomous systems focused on agentic workflows and generative AI technologies. This position will be full-time and remote.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy multi-agent systems and agentic applications using frameworks like AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, or similar
...
Use ML, deep learning, and Generative AI tools to design, evangelize, and implement state-of-the-art solutions
...
Define and implement best practices for building, testing, and deploying scalable AI solutions, with a focus on generative models and LLMs using proprietary or open-source models
...
Drive successful business outcomes by designing and building cloud-hosted Generative AI solutions
...
Work with public cloud (AWS) and on-premises infrastructure for deploying LLMs, agents, and orchestration systems
...
Evaluate, build, and fine-tune ML models and LLMs to solve complex business problems
...
Stay abreast of latest developments in agentic AI, autonomous systems, language models, and generative AI technologies.
...
- What You'll Need
- Required:
- BE, Master's or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or equivalent practical experience
...
4-8 years of overall technical experience with 0-2 years of hands-on experience in Generative AI and LLM technologies
...
1+ years of experience building agentic systems, workflow automation, or autonomous AI applications
...
Deep hands-on experience with agentic frameworks (AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, Agency Swarm, or similar)
...
Expertise in OpenAPI standards, Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocols, and Model Context Protocol (MCP)
...
Proven track record of deploying and optimizing LLM models for inference in production environments
...
Extensive experience with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex required)
...
Hands-on experience with Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker JumpStart, and other cloud-based LLM platforms
...
Expertise in RAG architectures, Fine-tuning techniques, and Prompt Engineering
...
Expert in NLP techniques and deep learning libraries (Transformer models, LSTM, BiLSTM, CNN, BERT, GPT, T5)
...
Proficiency with ML frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers, scikit-learn
...
Hands-on experience in MLOps/LLMOps including data pipelines, model training/refinement, validation, drift management, and serving
...
Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines for ML systems
...
Knowledge of monitoring, logging, and observability tools for production
...
Knowledge of reinforcement learning and agent training methodologies
...
Contributions to open-source AI/ML projects
...
Publications or patents in AI/ML domain

# Applied AI Data Scientist
...
🕒 June 9
...
🦌 Connecticut, Illinois, +2 more states – Remote🦌 Connecticut – Remote 🌽 Illinois – Remote 🌲 North Carolina – Remote 🏈 Ohio – Remote
...
💵 $90.2k - $135.2k / year
...
⏰ Full Time
...
📊 Data Scientist
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Build and optimize ML, deep learning, and GenAI models using modern frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn). • Design and deliver RAG pipelines, hybrid retrieval systems, and vector-based search workflows. • Develop Agentic AI solutions including tool orchestration, reasoning flows, and safe-execution strategies. • Run structured experimentation using evaluation metrics (BERTScore, BLEURT, semantic similarity, retrieval precision/recall). • Integrate solutions into GCP (Vertex AI, Workbench, Vector Search) and AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock). • Build ingestion, enrichment, and semantic retrieval flows for high-quality knowledge and feature engineering. • Partner with onshore and offshore DS/ML engineers to ensure quality, consistency, and shared technical patterns.
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• 3–5+ years in Data Science, ML Engineering, Applied AI, or GenAI roles. • Strong Python and SQL skills; experience with deep learning and ML libraries. • Hands-on experience building RAG systems, vector search pipelines, and GenAI applications. • Familiarity with modern LLM platforms (Vertex AI, OpenAI, Bedrock, Azure OpenAI). • Experience implementing evaluation methodologies for both ML and GenAI. • Ability to translate ambiguous business problems into well-structured ML/GenAI solutions. • Experience designing multi-step agent workflows and reasoning pipelines. • Strong grounding in statistics, experiment design, and feature engineering. • Ability to present complex concepts clearly to technical and business stakeholders. • Comfortable working with agile teams and collaborating across time zones. • Experience partnering with SMEs to validate and refine AI outputs. • Experience with Snowflake or enterprise data platforms (preferred). • Insurance domain knowledge (underwriting, claims, or risk analysis) (preferred). • Experience with multimodal LLMs or enterprise prompt/agent frameworks (preferred).

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

results.title: Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development | Wfhforgeon
...
# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.

results.title: Jacob Horton
highlights:
Data Scientist at [US Army Artificial Intelligence Integration Center (AI2C)](https://www.linkedin.com/company/armyaitf)
...
Army Captain transitioning from active duty after six years, currently building at the Army's AI Integration Center. Day to day, that means computer vision apps, data pipelines, and ML workflow tools — Python, SQL, Django, Docker — designed so operational users can actually use them. Outside of work, I'm building a geopolitical market intelligence platform fusing 5 data sources (GDELT events, financial markets, news headlines, FRED economic indicators, and Polymarket prediction odds) into a unified dashboard with a Claude-powered AI analyst agent, statistical modeling, and a full Prefect/PostgreSQL/FastAPI backend. I came up through Battalion S2 and Detachment XO roles before pivoting into my current position, and finished my master's at CMU (MISM-BIDA) in May. The Army taught me how to lead teams, juggle competing priorities, and ship things that work under constraints — skills that translate regardless of the tech stack. TS/SCI cleared. Open to opportunities in the Jacksonville or Tampa area.
...
### Data Scientist at [US Army Artificial Intelligence Integration Center (AI2C)](https://www.linkedin.com/company/armyaitf) (Current)
...
- Build and integrate the Community Computer Vision Toolkit (CCVT)—a React + Django/DRF web application for training and evaluating YOLO models for aided threat recognition
...
- Operationalize end-to-end ML workflows: dataset ingest, CVAT annotation, FiftyOne curation, MLflow experiment tracking, and Docker packaging for repeatable runs
...
- Design REST endpoints and UI components enabling non-ML users to launch training jobs, monitor runs, and compare model performance—reducing cross-team handoffs and shortening iteration cycles
...
Geopolitical Market Intelligence Platform | Jan 2026 – Present Full-stack intelligence platform fusing 5 data sources — geopolitical events, financial markets, news headlines, economic indicators, and prediction market odds — into a unified dashboard with an AI analyst agent built with Claude Code. WHAT IT DOES - Ingests 1,000+ daily GDELT events; tracks 33 instruments (commodities, currencies, ETFs, VIX) - Integrates FRED indicators, RSS headlines (Reuters, AP, BBC), and Polymarket prediction odds - Links events to assets via domain-encoded mappings (e.g., Russia → Ruble, Gas, Oil) AI AGENT - LangGraph multi-agent pipeline — deterministic collection/analysis nodes, LLM synthesis via Gemma 4 26B (Ollama) - 15 tools: events, correlations, predictions, anomaly detection via natural language - RAG retrieval via pgvector; fully traced in LangSmith ML PIPELINE - 5 models (LogReg, Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM, MLP) on ~9,300 event-asset pairs - MLflow champion/challenger promotion; FinBERT sentiment; 384-dim embeddings ANALYSIS - Correlation: Pearson/Spearman with rolling windows and confidence intervals - Event Study: Cumulative Abnormal Returns (CAR) with t-test and Wilcoxon testing - Anomaly Detection: Z-score and Isolation Forest - Historical Patterns: Conditional probability by event type (e.g., "conflict → oil UP 72%") TECHNICAL - 29-endpoint FastAPI; daily Prefect pipeline; Docker Compose (7 services) - PostgreSQL + pgvector, SQLAlchemy, Alembic - 8-page React dashboard: choropleth map, price-event timelines, correlation heatmaps, AI chat STACK Python · React · FastAPI · PostgreSQL · LangGraph · MLflow · Ollama · LangSmith · Prefect · scikit-learn · PyTorch · XGBoost · statsmodels · Tailwind · Docker Skills: Python, Machine Learning, MLOps, LangGraph, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Data Engineering, Statistical Analysis, AI Engineering Show less
